chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 424 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 19.02.2018. Mr. Raza Muhammad Gadehi Advocate for petitioner -=-=- It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that alleged detenue Abdul Hamed Tevno s/o Muhammad Usman has reached to home safely, therefore, he does not press this constitutional petition which is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE
